scripts.pack:auth: npm run build:auth && cd dist/hub-auth && npm pack
scripts.publish:auth: npm run build:auth && cd dist/hub-auth && npm publish --access public
scripts.install:shell: npm run build:auth && cd ../daruix-hub-shell && npm install ../daruix-hub-auth/dist/hub-auth
scripts.install:mfe-remessas: npm run build:auth && cd ../daruix-mfe-remessas && npm install ../daruix-hub-auth/dist/hub-auth
scripts.release:auth:patch: npm run version:auth:patch && npm run build:auth
scripts.release:auth:minor: npm run version:auth:minor && npm run build:auth
scripts.release:auth:major: npm run version:auth:major && npm run build:auth
